original_abstract: Here we present NeuroVault-a web based repository that allows researchers to store, share, visualize, and decode statistical maps of the human brain. NeuroVault is easy to use and employs modern web technologies to provide informative visualization of data without the need to install additional software. In addition, it leverages the power of the Neurosynth database to provide cognitive decoding of deposited maps. The data are exposed through a public REST API enabling other services and tools to take advantage of it. NeuroVault is a new resource for researchers interested in conducting meta- and coactivation analyses.
humanized_abstract: This site hosts NeuroVault, a web application for archiving, sharing, displaying and decoding brain maps. It is easy to use, and works in all popular browsers without requiring installation of any additional software. The site utilizes all modern web technologies for an engaging visualization experience. All of the cognitive decoding power of Neurosynth is also at your disposal. Data are served via a REST API so that other web applications and tools may also take advantage of the data contained here. NeuroVault is a new tool for researchers interested in the analysis of brain function through meta-analyses and coactivation analyses.
